description: Frozen preprocessing contract for agentic hyperparameter tuning

qc_params.description: QC parameters are frozen; agents cannot modify data filtering

normalization_description: Log normalization via scanpy.preprocessing.log1p; cannot change
hvg_description: 2000 highly variable genes selected; frozen count
doublet_description: Doublet removal via Scrublet; frozen method
ambient_description: Ambient RNA removal via decontX; frozen method
frozen_modules_description: These modules cannot be edited during agentic search
data_hash_description: Will be computed when data is loaded; used for integrity verification

constraints.description: Agents work only with preprocessed, frozen data
